0.review: Complete haircut disaster! I showed a precise photo and the result has nothing to do with it. Plus, I was charged for a treatment I didn't ask for. Really disgusted.
0.response: Mrs. M., we sincerely apologize that your experience did not meet your expectations. A gap between the desired cut and the result is unacceptable to us. We would like to discuss with you to find a solution. Please contact us at your convenience. — The Elegance Salon Team

1.review: Disastrous service, 45 min wait for the appetizer. The dish was cold and the waiter ignored us. Never again.
1.response: Mr. D., we sincerely apologize for this wait and service below our standards. Your feedback is valuable for us to improve. We would be delighted to welcome you back. Please contact us privately to discuss. — The Le Bistro Parisien Team

2.review: Noisy room, parking lot view. For the price paid, we expected much better. Breakfast was okay but not exceptional.
2.response: Mrs. L., we regret that your stay did not meet your expectations, especially regarding peace and the view. We take note to improve our guests' experience. Feel free to contact us for a future stay. — Hotel Les Pins

3.review: Rushed massage, the practitioner seemed in a hurry. The ambiance was nice but the overall experience disappointing for the price.
3.response: Mr. T., we are sorry that your massage did not meet expectations. The quality of our treatments is our top priority. We would like to give you a second chance: contact us to reschedule. — The Spa Zenitude Team

4.review: Order lost, coffee served lukewarm. Staff seemed overwhelmed and nobody apologized. Very disappointed.
4.response: Mrs. B., we sincerely apologize for this error and our team's lack of responsiveness. This is not the service level we aim for. Please contact us — we will be happy to offer you a free coffee on your next visit. — Café des Artistes Team

problem.headline: The Silent Threat to Your Business: Unmanaged Feedback.
problem.intro: Every day, restaurant owners lose hours managing reviews, suffer from damaging 1-star ratings, and miss out on amplifying positive feedback. One bad review can tank your Google rating—and your bookings.
problem.solution: Introducing your 24/7 Customer Relationship Director. An AI that never sleeps, protects your reputation, and turns satisfied customers into your best advocates.

negativeFilter.headline: The Ultimate Reputation Shield: How We Eradicate 1-Star Reviews.
negativeFilter.step1: AI engages customer via WhatsApp: "How was your experience?"
negativeFilter.step2: If negative, AI responds: "We're truly sorry. Instead of posting on Google, would you like to privately message the owner to resolve this directly?"
negativeFilter.step3: Customer vents privately. Owner receives discreet WhatsApp alert.
negativeFilter.result: A 1-star review never appears on Google. This feature alone is worth more than the subscription.

commandCenter.title: Smart e-reputation dashboard

multilingue.title: Local Response, Global Reach
multilingue.desc: AI detects and responds in your customers' language (English, Spanish, Italian, etc.) with a native tone. Vision focuses on your local language.

bouclier.title: 24/7 Brand Protection
bouclier.desc: Automatic detection of insults and fake reviews. AI generates and sends an official removal request to Google instantly to protect your e-reputation.

whatsapp.title: Commando Reactivity
whatsapp.desc: Never miss an emergency. Get an instant WhatsApp notification only for bad reviews, so you can put out the fire before it spreads.

capture.title: 5-Star Generator
capture.desc: Our AI contacts your customers via WhatsApp 30 min after their visit to collect their review. Don't leave your rating to chance: drive your success.

boostSeo.title: Local SEO Domination
boostSeo.desc: AI intelligently injects your strategic keywords into every response to push Google to rank you on page 1. Be the first choice in your city.

reporting.title: Strategic Oversight
reporting.desc: Receive detailed monthly reports with progress charts and sentiment analysis. Make data-driven decisions to grow your business.

googleFlywheel.headline: Why Your Reputation Is Your Best Search Engine
googleFlywheel.subtitle: This is not an opinion — it is the documented behaviour of the Google My Business algorithm.

step1.title: Customer credibility
step1.result: You build credibility and trust with potential customers who compare businesses before choosing.

step2.title: Positive Google signal
step2.result: Google detects human activity and responsive customer service — two strong positive signals for your score.

step3.title: Top of search results
step3.result: Your business naturally climbs to the top of Google results without paying for ads.

googleFlywheel.equation: The equation is simple: the more reviews you have and the more you reply, the better Google ranks you.
googleFlywheel.equationSource: Based on official Google My Business guidelines

testimonials.headline: What Restaurant Owners Say About Their New Director.
testimonials.subtitle: Join hundreds of restaurant owners who sleep better at night.

1.quote: The smart filter alone has saved us. We used to get 2-3 unfair reviews a month that dragged us down. Now? Zero public disasters. Worth every euro for peace of mind.
1.name: Sophie M.

2.quote: It's like having a 24/7 reputation director. I get WhatsApp alerts for emergencies, and the AI handles the rest. Our rating went from 3.9 to 4.8 in 4 months. Essential.
2.name: Marco D.

3.quote: Peace of mind, that's what I pay for. The ZENITH plan is the best investment we've made: our customers are automatically followed up and our Google visibility has exploded.
3.name: Isabelle R.

googleMaps.q: Can the AI really help me rank higher on Google Maps?
googleMaps.a: Yes. Google favors businesses that respond quickly and use relevant keywords. Our ZENITH plan strategically injects these keywords into your responses to signal to the algorithm that you're the best local choice.

iaDetectable.q: Will my customers notice it's AI?
iaDetectable.a: Absolutely not. Our models are trained on thousands of real responses from restaurant and business owners. The tone is warm, professional and indistinguishable from a human response. That's what we call passing the Turing test.

installTime.q: How long does it take to set up?
installTime.a: Less than 2 minutes. You connect your Google Business account, and the AI starts analyzing your reviews immediately. No software to install, everything runs on your Reputexa dashboard.

gratuit14j.q: Is it really free for 14 days? No credit card?
gratuit14j.a: Yes. We're so confident in the impact on your revenue that we offer full access without asking for your bank details. If you're not impressed by the results, you don't have to do anything.

mentionsLegales.title: Legal Notice
mentionsLegales.metaDescription: Legal notice and Impressum. Publisher, hosting in the EU, French law.
mentionsLegales.intro: In accordance with applicable regulations and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), this legal notice identifies the parties responsible for the creation and operation of reputexa.fr.
mentionsLegales.editeur_content: The site reputexa.fr is published by REPUTEXA, headquartered in France. Company name, full address, registration number and VAT number are available on request at contact@reputexa.fr.
mentionsLegales.impressum_content: In accordance with German (Teledienstgesetz, § 5 TMG) and EU requirements, the publisher information (Impressum) is as follows: website publisher REPUTEXA, headquarters in France. Contact: contact@reputexa.fr. This notice serves as the Impressum for all users, including those in Germany.
mentionsLegales.directeur_content: The publication director is the founder of REPUTEXA.
mentionsLegales.hebergeur_title: 4. Hosting — Servers in the European Union
mentionsLegales.hebergeur_content: The application and data are hosted on infrastructure located within the European Union: Vercel (application hosting, EU regions) and Supabase (database and authentication, EU regions). These providers ensure GDPR compliance and data location in the EU.
mentionsLegales.droit_content: French law applies. Without prejudice to mandatory provisions in the user's country of residence within the European Union, this notice and the site are governed by French law. Users who are consumers in the EU retain the rights granted by the mandatory provisions of their country of residence.
mentionsLegales.prop_intel_content: All site content (texts, graphics, logos, databases) is protected by copyright and trademark law. Any unauthorised reproduction or use may constitute infringement and be subject to legal action.
mentionsLegales.liens_content: The site may contain links to third-party sites. REPUTEXA has no control over these sites and disclaims all responsibility for their content. Creating links to reputexa.fr requires prior approval from the publisher.
mentionsLegales.contact_content: For any questions regarding this legal notice: contact@reputexa.fr.

confidentialite.title: Privacy Policy
confidentialite.metaDescription: Privacy policy and data protection. GDPR, sub-processors, AI, data hosted in the EU.
confidentialite.intro: Last updated: March 2026. This policy describes how REPUTEXA collects, uses and protects your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable EU law.

toc.label: 6. AI guarantee — Data not used for training

confidentialite.responsable_content: The data controller is REPUTEXA, publisher of reputexa.fr, headquartered in France. We process your data lawfully, fairly and transparently in accordance with the GDPR.
confidentialite.donnees_content: We collect in particular: professional email for account and authentication; billing and payment data transmitted to Stripe; review content and Google Business Profile data (Google API); name, phone, establishment name, address; language preference; technical data (IP, logs, technical cookies).
confidentialite.locale_content: To improve your experience and offer interface, communications and support in your language, we may infer a language preference from your phone number prefix (e.g. +33 France, +39 Italy, +34 Spain, +49 Germany). This is used only to personalise interface language, emails and the payment portal. You can change the language at any time in your account settings.
confidentialite.finalites_content: Data is processed for: contract performance (account, subscription, service); legitimate interest (service improvement, fraud prevention); consent (newsletter, marketing, withdrawable); legal obligation (invoice retention, tax compliance).
confidentialite.sous_traitants_content: Your data may be processed by the following sub-processors, strictly for their assigned tasks and in compliance with the GDPR: Stripe (payments, billing, subscriptions); Resend (transactional emails: confirmation, alerts, notifications); OpenAI and/or Anthropic (AI processing for generating review response suggestions); Supabase (data hosting and authentication, EU); Vercel (application hosting, EU); Google (OAuth, Google Business Profile API); Meta/WhatsApp (alerts and notifications if enabled). These providers are bound by GDPR-compliant contractual obligations.
confidentialite.ia_title: 6. AI guarantee — Data not used for training
confidentialite.ia_content: Data you provide to REPUTEXA for generating review responses (review content, establishment context) is processed by AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic or equivalent) only to produce these suggestions. We guarantee that this data is not used to train the providers' AI models: it remains confidential and is used solely for service delivery. The confidentiality of your business data and your customers' reviews is thus protected.
confidentialite.droits_content: Under the GDPR you have the right of access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, portability and objection. To exercise these rights: contact@reputexa.fr. You may lodge a complaint with the CNIL (cnil.fr) or the supervisory authority in your country of residence.
confidentialite.contact_content: For any questions regarding the protection of your data: contact@reputexa.fr.

cgu.title: Terms of Use
cgu.metaDescription: REPUTEXA terms of use. Vision, Pulse, Zenith plans. Language differentiation, VAT, Stripe, French law.
cgu.intro: Last updated: March 2026. These Terms of Use govern the use of the REPUTEXA service and apply to any subscription taken out on reputexa.fr.

toc.label: 3. Differentiation clause — Language of AI responses

cgu.objet_content: These Terms define the terms of access to and use of the REPUTEXA SaaS e-reputation platform. By creating an account or subscribing, you accept these terms without reservation.
cgu.plans_content: REPUTEXA offers three subscription plans: Vision, Pulse and Zenith. Features (review aggregation, AI responses, alerts, reporting) vary by plan. Full offer descriptions are on the Pricing page.
cgu.langue_title: 3. Differentiation clause — Language of AI responses
cgu.langue_content: By contract, the language of AI-generated responses is differentiated by plan: Vision plan: responses to reviews are generated exclusively in the establishment's language (user profile language). The service does not provide responses in other languages. Pulse and Zenith plans: the service is polyglot; responses are generated natively in the language of the customer review (automatic detection and reply in that same language). This clause is an integral part of the service conditions and may only be changed by changing plan.
cgu.facturation_content: Prices displayed are excluding tax. VAT is calculated and applied automatically by Stripe according to the buyer's country and applicable rules (EU VAT, local rates, etc.). Payment is collected by Stripe (cards, SEPA, local methods). Subscription is recurring (monthly or annual). Any started month is due in full; on termination, no refund for remaining days. Invoices are available in your account and via the Stripe portal.
cgu.droit_content: These Terms are governed by French law. Failing amicable agreement, exclusive jurisdiction is assigned to the Paris Commercial Court for any dispute. Consumer customers in the EU may bring proceedings in the courts of their place of residence under Regulation (EU) No 1215/2012 (Brussels I bis).
cgu.contact_content: For any questions regarding these Terms: contact@reputexa.fr.
